title: BEM-848 protocol status marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:40 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem847_parse_response_evidence_for_protocol.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
if status_in=='real_response_evidence_present_protocol_can_advance':
    marker=Path('governance/state/bem848_PROTOCOL_CAN_ADVANCE.marker')
    status='protocol_can_advance_to_v1'
    next_action='promote BEM846 protocol to v1.0 with evidence references'
else:
    marker=Path('governance/state/bem848_PROTOCOL_REMAINS_DRAFT_REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_MISSING.marker')
    status='protocol_remains_draft_real_response_missing'
    next_action='continue Claude runtime/response repair; do not claim fully agreed protocol'
marker.write_text('BEM-848 '+status+' | '+created+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-848','status':status,'bem847_status':status_in,'real_response_count':prev.get('real_response_count'),'blocker_count':prev.get('blocker_count'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem848_branch_marker_protocol_status.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem848_branch_marker_protocol_status.md').write_text('# BEM-848 | Branch Marker Protocol Status | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-848'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(marker),'governance/state/bem848_branch_marker_protocol_status.json','governance/reports/bem848_branch_marker_protocol_status.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem848_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Created branch-specific marker showing whether protocol can advance to v1 or remains draft due to missing real Claude response')
"""
No issue comments.
